system.description:
The knobby finger-bone of a swamp troll steeped in acrid embalming fluid.

Benefit. This wand contains the spells @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.Item.M702ErO4KOtMJzsK]{animate dead} (pg. 54) and @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.Item.uNxbpd7fENzDUxfd]{create undead} (pg. 58).

Curse. Each time you use the wand to cast a spell, you take [[/r 1d4]] points of Constitution damage. If you reach 0 Constitution from this effect, you die and turn into a zombie.
